Uses of Interface
org.bukkit.material.Colorable

Packages that use Colorable
Package
Description
org.bukkit.block
Classes used to manipulate the voxels in a world, including special states.
org.bukkit.block.sign
Classes relevant to signs.
org.bukkit.entity
Interfaces for non-voxel objects that can exist in a world, including all players, monsters, projectiles, etc.
org.bukkit.material
Classes that represents various voxel types and states.

    Modifier and Type
    Interface
    Description
    interface 
    Bed
    Represents a captured state of a bed.
    interface 
    HangingSign
    Represents a captured state of a hanging sign.
    interface 
    Sign
    Represents a captured state of either a SignPost or a WallSign.
